---
title: "Around Amsterdam: By Day and Night"
subtitle: "Amsterdam, Haarlem & Utrecht · May 2026"
categories:
  - Travel
  - Architecture
  - Cityscape
  - Netherlands
date: "2026-05-23"
image: "images/great_crested_grebe.JPG"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    lightbox: true
---

A few days around Amsterdam, Haarlem, Zandvoort, and Utrecht.

### By Day

::: {layout-ncol=1}

![*Great Crested Grebe with Catch*](images/great_crested_grebe.JPG)

![*Canal in Bloom*](images/canal_flowers.JPG)

![*Windmill on the Canal*](images/windmill.JPG)

![*\"This Prison Has the Best Escape Plan\"*](images/prison_uni_sign.JPG)

![*Inside the Old Prison*](images/prison_uni_stairs.JPG)

:::

### By Night

::: {layout-ncol=1}

![*Illuminated Steps*](images/light_stairs.JPG)

![*A'DAM Tower at Night*](images/night_tower.JPG)

![*Skyline at Dusk*](images/skyline.JPG)

![*The Crew*](images/group_selfie.JPG)

:::
